subcodes.first_line: Thou dost witness, O my God, how He Who is Thy splendor calleth Thee to remembrance
subcodes.first_line_orig: تری یا الهی بان البهاء یذکرک بعد الذی ورد علیه من البلا ما لایقدر ان یحصیه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
